itinerary.title: Arrival in Bali and Beachside Relaxation
itinerary.description: Arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS) in Bali, where our team will welcome you and transfer you to your hotel in Seminyak or Kuta. Spend the rest of the day at leisure, relaxing by the pool or taking a walk on the nearby beaches.

itinerary.title: Ubud Culture, Rice Terraces, and Kintamani Volcano
itinerary.description: Enjoy a full-day tour of Ubud. Visit the Sacred Monkey Forest, the scenic Tegalalang Rice Terraces, and drive up to Kintamani Volcano to enjoy lunch overlooking Mount Batur and its crater lake. Visit the holy springs of Tirta Empul Temple and shop for souvenirs at the Ubud Art Market.

itinerary.title: Tanah Lot Temple Sunset and Balinese Spa
itinerary.description: Spend the morning at leisure, or opt for an optional white-water river rafting or cycling tour. In the afternoon, visit the famous cliffside Tanah Lot Sea Temple for sunset views. End the day with a relaxing 60-minute traditional Balinese massage and spa treatment.

itinerary.title: Tanjung Benoa Water Sports and Uluwatu Kecak Dance
itinerary.description: Head to Tanjung Benoa Beach for fun water activities like a banana boat ride, jet skiing, or parasailing. In the afternoon, relax on the sands of Padang Padang Beach or Dreamland Beach. Travel to the cliffside Uluwatu Temple to watch the traditional sunset Kecak Fire Dance.

itinerary.title: Nusa Penida Island Tour or Canggu Beach Day
itinerary.description: Take an optional day trip to Nusa Penida Island to visit Kelingking Beach, Angel's Billabong, and Broken Beach. Alternatively, spend a free day beach hopping and shopping around Canggu, Seminyak, or Uluwatu.

itinerary.title: Optional Lovina Dolphin Watching and Jimbaran BBQ Dinner
itinerary.description: Enjoy an optional early morning boat trip to see wild dolphins at Lovina Beach in North Bali. Alternatively, spend a relaxing day at your resort. In the evening, enjoy a sunset beachside seafood BBQ dinner at Jimbaran Bay.

itinerary.title: Departure from Bali
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final breakfast at your resort before checking out and taking a private transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

title: Bali Bliss
description: Experience the culture and beaches of Bali on this 7-day tropical tour. Visit Ubud's rice terraces, view Mount Batur volcano, watch the Uluwatu Kecak dance, and enjoy a seafood dinner on Jimbaran Beach.
highlights: Explore the Sacred Monkey Forest and rice terraces in Ubud
Visit the cliffside sea temples of Tanah Lot and Uluwatu
Enjoy water sports at Tanjung Benoa and an optional Nusa Penida trip
Sunset seafood BBQ dinner on the sands of Jimbaran Beach
